title: No Enchant Cap
description: A simple mod to enhance some aspects of enchanting.
body: About: Image examples can be found on the Wiki. No Enchant Cap enhances the vanilla enchanting system in a few ways: Enchantments over level 10 or below level 1 will display their level correctly. Anvils will no longer give the "Too Expensive" limit. No Enchant Cap also provides a selection of gamerules which allow you to customize your enchanting experience. You can mix any enchantments on the same item. (Off by default). You can put any enchantment on any item. (Off by default). Anvils can go above the usual max level of an enchantment. (Off by default). Repair costs of items on anvils doesn't increase. (On by default). Experience costs are done more fairly at high levels. (On by default). Interested in hosting a server for any of my mods? Be sure to go with Bloom Host [here](https://billing.bloom.host/aff.php?aff=10). [](https://billing.bloom.host/aff.php?aff=10) Buying a server using this link supports me directly!
